---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a scoped improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or review task would this improve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Evidence Needed

What tests, docs, or verification commands should accompany it?

## Boundaries

Confirm whether this is a core algorithm, optional baseline, demo, or documented
workflow. Avoid broad production claims unless the evidence supports them.
